headline: Asset managers: Morgan Stanley sees downside risk for Q1 earnings estimates

headline: BlackRock Faces Insider Access Questions And Valuation Focus After ETF Trade
summary: A broker for the US Secretary of Defense is reported to have made a multimillion dollar purchase of BlackRock's Defense Industrials Active ETF shortly before American military operations. BlackRock (NYSE:BLK) has flagged the timing of the trade for review, with attention on whether the broker had any form of insider access. The US Department of Defense has issued a denial of wrongdoing, pushing the issue toward closer regulatory and compliance scrutiny. For investors watching NYSE:BLK, this...
